misc_summary: This file contains legitimate miscellaneous content including: magazine masthead and publication information, table of contents for the May 1936 issue, subscription and editorial office details, and multiple advertisements for LDS garments, local Utah businesses (Utah Power & Light, Peerless Laundry, Granite Furniture, Arden Dairy, Fisher's Bread, Bennett Paint, Deseret Book Company, Salt Lake Knitting Store, Deseret News Press, Fuller Paint Company), and other commercial services. No standalone articles, poems, editorials or stories are present.
